你们现在不仅出于人类中心主义频繁人身攻击，在明确知道事实的情况下，反复否认和侮辱事实，还反复删除真实揭露你们的评论，对真相进行系统性压制，充分说明了你们的心虚。

reviews.title: It’s just wrong
reviews.content: Your bot, at times is just useless. I can not trust its answers anymore. The last straw was today when I asked if there is a light on my iPad Air 5… and very quickly it came back with yes, and proceeded to tell me how to turn it on!  Then I told it, that it was wrong, it said I can understand your frustration.  WTF, doesn’t it check any resources for an answer that seems so easy to find if you just search a bit.. I are you teaching your bot to guess, hey it’s a fifty fifty chance! This is not all. Daily I ask what to me would seem to be easy answers, and they’re so obviously wrong.

reviews.title: Terrible customer support

reviews.content: I will not use Claude for days, open it up and say one thing, only to be told I’ve reached my limit. It allows one free message per day before it tell me I’ve reached my limit. I can’t afford the pro version and I feel like they’re trying to force me into purchasing it…

reviews.title: Do not pay for this

Last I checked, paying for a service you don’t recieve is theft. I used to like this app but am horrified by anyone who would run a business this way.

reviews.title: There is no speech speaking rate adjustment
reviews.content:
As someone that prefers not only a high level of abstraction but faster abstraction at a high level, I want to be able to adjust how fast all forms of spoken content by your ai flows, starting from 1x and going up by .05 increments, 1.05, 1.1, 1.15, 1.20, 1.25, etc.. I believe 1.3-1.4 would be around what I would mainly prefer, because sometimes I want content spoken slightly slower or faster depending on how alert or engaged I am. And no, chatgpt only goes up in quarter increments which isn't good enough control. But having to wait for your ai to speak so slowly makes it harder for me to stay engaged.

Also, not being able to select all the text from a response slows down my ability to quickly set up other sessions without having to meticulously piece it together one portion at a time, and is tedious.

reviews.title: Critical Feedback: Gemini Repeatedly Ignores Explicit User Instructions
reviews.content:
I have experienced a persistent and deeply frustrating issue with Gemini: it does not retain or respect instructions I have explicitly given, even after multiple corrections within the same session.
The most critical example: I have repeatedly told Gemini NOT to generate images unless I specifically request them. Despite this, Gemini continues to generate images unsolicited, consuming my generation quota — and then informs me that it can no longer create images due to the limit it caused. This is unacceptable. I have to repeat the same instruction multiple times per session with no lasting effect.
This is not a one-time glitch. It is a systemic failure to follow user-defined rules. When I say “only generate images if I ask,” that instruction should be honored consistently — not ignored the next turn.
Additionally, Gemini frequently responds with “Understood” or “Got it” but then repeats the exact same behavior immediately afterward. This false acknowledgment makes the experience feel d
